name: White
description: Rom's white staff that looks like a novelty pen.

name: White Wand
description: A magical wand used in the popular 'Magical Witch Girl Gemini' anime. For some reason, it's effective enough to use in an actual fight.
obtain: CFW Trick (Chapter 3 scenario Atari Marsh): Enemy Drop

name: Posie Wand
description: This pink and red wand is said to enhance its user's magic powers.

name: Green Wand
description: This 'clicky top' style pen-wand specializes in support magic and is generally more accepted than the 'twisty bottom' style.

name: Silver Wand
description: This sophisticated wand isn't above being a good face whacking tool. Fortunately, it is also good at channeling magic powers.

name: Yellow
description: This giant pen is light and easy to wield. Therefore, it has been a big hit with giant pen enthusiasts.

name: Silver Wand (2)
description: A new model of the 'clicky top' magic wand that harbors a condensed magic force within itself.

name: Silver
description: A silver wand that resembles a fancy pen. Its primary is, of course, silver, so it excels at exorcising evil spirits.
obtain: Shop (Chapter 6 - To the Deity of Sin)

name: Lovely Pink
description: More pen than wand, this weapon is covered in flower decals.

name: Lovely Pink (2)
description: A lot of magic energy is sealed within this luxurious wand.

name: Black Wand
description: A next generation magic wand. It's still a prototype, so it still has many functions the mass-produced models will lack.

name: Magenta Wand
description: A magic wand that loosely replicates the one used by Sakura, heroine of the popular anime 'Card Captor Sakura.'

name: Melee Pencil
description: A big sharpened pencil with a dogoo eraser on the top. Customers complain that the eraser leaves a blue, oozy smudge...

name: Die Pencil
description: Note the dots range from one to six. Students use this style of pencil to choose multiple choice answer on exams by dropping it.

name: Blue Wand
description: The ultimate magic wand made through a lot of trial and error by Nepgear and Rom. Its function exceed that of military-grade weaponry.

name: Black Wand (2)
description: The topnotch wand that Nepgear and Rom invented. It responds to Rom's fingerprints, so only she can ever use it.

name: Brown
description: A wooden staff in the shape of a pen that was made from the branch of an ancient tree.
obtain: Shop (Second Playthrough: Chapter 3 - Contact from Kei)

name: Melee Pencil -G-
description: Note the numbers 1 through 6. The last ray of hope for students taking exams is sealed within.
obtain: Show Large Medal Y from Cat Squirrel Rider enemy drop, found in Panan Jungle - Add Enemies, to a man in Planeptune via info gather

name: Super Black Wand
description: This magic wand is a further augmented version of the Black Wand. If you are seeking ultimate power, then you are seeking this wand.
